p.font-family: "??", "??", Poppins, Oswald, Montserrat, Roboto, "Glow Sans SC", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", sans-serif, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

pre.background: rgb(18, 18, 18) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
pre.font-family: OperatorMonoSSmLig-Book, "PT Mono", Consolas, Monaco, "Andale Mono", "Ubuntu Mono", monospace

pre::before.font-family: Rubik, Lato, "Lucida Grande", "Lucida Sans Unicode", Tahoma, sans-serif

pre.language-js::before.font-family: Rubik, Lato, "Lucida Grande", "Lucida Sans Unicode", Tahoma, sans-serif
